pattern.imageEvidence: seasonal work in progress with safety context
pattern.styleContract: Black-cherry seasonal urgency with warmer editorial proof staging, ladder-safety evidence, restrained warm-light action accents, and a reserve-date board as the signature move.

tagline: Roofline lights installed before the cold gets bossy.

hero.title: RidgeGlow holiday light installation hero image
hero.alt: Two holiday light installers safely placing warm white roofline lights on a suburban home at blue-hour dusk.

contact.serviceArea: Holiday roofline lights, porch columns, wreaths, timers, removal, and labeled storage for homes across the north suburbs, lake neighborhoods, and nearby cul-de-sacs

copy.eyebrow: Holiday lights with clip-safe roofline planning
copy.heroText: RidgeGlow maps rooflines, clips, outlets, timers, ladder access, install week, and takedown labels before the first strand goes up.
copy.introTitle: Reserve dates, clips, timers, and takedown in one plan.
copy.introText: We plan the line, power access, timer location, ladder approach, clip style, removal date, and storage labels before the first strand goes up.
copy.proofTitle: Date and ladder checks before the glow
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to hold your install week?
copy.quoteText: Send a front-of-house photo, roofline wish list, outlet notes, and ideal install week. We reply with available dates, ladder notes, clip plan, and removal timing.

services.title: Warm White Roofline
services.text: Straight, classic roofline lights with clean clips, power planning, timer setup, and a final dusk check before the ladder leaves.

services.title: Classic Plus Accents
services.text: Roofline lighting plus porch columns, wreaths, small trees, or garage trim for homes that want a little more sparkle without going full parade float.

services.title: Removal And Storage
services.text: Post-season takedown, strand check, clip sorting, and labeled storage notes so next year starts with fewer tangled mysteries.

process.title: Send the roofline
process.text: A wide front photo, power outlet notes, steep areas, and the style you like help us build a real date and ladder plan.

process.title: Install with a checklist
process.text: The crew checks clips, ladder placement, cords, timers, roof edges, and the final run before turning the glow on.

process.title: Remove and label
process.text: After the season, we remove strands cleanly, check for repairs, and label storage so next winter does not start in a knot.

brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic urgent-checklist recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: Oct-Nov: best install window before weather gets rude.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send photos from the ground, access notes, weather or date constraints, and the warning signs you noticed so the visit starts safely.
serviceDetails.prepNote: A wide front photo, power outlet notes, steep areas, and the style you like help us build a real date and ladder plan.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Risk-check flow for Holiday roofline lights, porch columns, wreaths, timers, removal, and labeled storage for homes across the north suburbs, lake neighborhoods, and nearby cul-de-sacs: photos, weather, access, and no-go conditions shape the safe visit plan.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For holiday light installation service, roofline photos, outlet locations, ladder reach, timers, and takedown timing shape the plan before a date is promised.
